Bash(python -c "import json,sys; m=json.load\(sys.stdin\); r=m.get\('routes',{}\); k=[x for x in r.keys\(\) if 'interactive' in x.lower\(\) or x=='/']; print\('routes with interactive or /:', k\); print\(\); [print\(rk,'->',list\(r[rk].keys\(\)\) if isinstance\(r[rk],dict\) else '?'\) for rk in k]")
